label: The Disruptor
gift: Interruption — breaking stagnation and protecting integrity over harmony.

cards.name: Notice your own urge to break things — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: clean interruption, sensing what is here.
steps: Notice what is actually here, sensing what is here.
Practice it within: your own urge to break things.
Shadow check: the Demolisher — rupture with no repair.
